name: Suspicious Velociraptor EDR Agent Execution Linked to Ransomware Activity
description: Detects potentially malicious execution of Velociraptor agent/tool that may indicate lateral movement, data collection, or ransomware delivery channel

author: Bien Joshua Philip De Leon & Lance Albert Mendoza
